3309760.name: Endless Leveling In Mycelium Dungeons: from zero to infinity
3309760.description:
Endless Leveling In Mycelium Dungeons: from zero to infinity — is a dark fantasy game with a telling title. This is a hardcore Action RPG in which everyone can make their own interesting and unique build. An endless leveling tree, 50+ different skills, 2000+ skill combinations and an almost complete absence of restrictions will help you cope with this task. Become the new deity of this world, if, of course, you succeed.

One day, a woman died in a terrible magical ceremony in order to give birth to a being with potential similar to a deity. This strengthened her fetus and filled it with all kinds of magic of this world. The being that the woman gave birth to — is You. You will have to surpass the old deity, who was killed by the Devourer of Worlds. And make the most important choice: to continue the endless war, to subjugate the magic of another dimension and become a Devourer of Worlds himself, or to become a new deity protecting this world.

Bend the will of the magical jewels and use their powers to improve your abilities. Build a unique build by combining randomly created and rare ancient jewels. The longer the branch of the tree is grown, the more powerful the benefits it provides. However, be careful, these jewels can both strengthen and weaken you and your foes. Adjust the stats the way you like — lower the resistances and speed of enemies to zero and infinitely increase your own.

In addition to the usual enemies, there are Highly Dangerous Tainted Foes in that world. Fight dozens of different Highly Dangerous Foes and get rewarded with new skills and levels for existing ones. If you can defeat high-level Foes, raise your skill and get additional abilities. One small and basic fireball today is a huge hail of incinerating fireballs tomorrow.

Although, unlike other magicians, you can master all types of magic, however, so far you have been able to control only one type. Cleanse the world of mycelium infestation and train hard, and one day you will be able to master all kinds of magic, even the rarest and most enormously powerful abilities.

To save the world that is fading after the tragedy, you will have to push the usual limits. Use an infinite number of character levels to upgrade literally ALL your abilities and stats. Raise your resistances above 100% and use the enemies' skills to your advantage. Reduce your skill cooldown to 0, and show the monitor how to draw pixels. Accelerate your movement speed to become elusive. The number of projectiles, the size of the skill area, health regeneration, chance of a critical hit, and much, much more that comes to your mind, you can improve to infinity. But be careful, you can also accidentally give the enemies all the same whether it's advantages or disadvantages =).

There are an infinite number of mycelium-infested areas in this world that you need to clean up. On some of them you will need to survive, as in the genres of Survivors-like, destroying crowds of foes, and on others you will need to light your way out of the darkness, burning out all the mycelium that you can find.

Despite the opportunity to upgrade your character to infinity, and subsequently become immortal, the first steps will hit you extremely hard. ELIMD: from zero to infinity was designed to be played in a single-life mode. However, the game also has a regular mode, with the possibility of multiple deaths and penalties for this. Great power will need to be truly earned. It can be either a smart building or an ordinary stacking of power bit by bit.
3309760.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
